title: Microsoft Dynamics 365 Account
description: Business that represents a customer or potential customer. The company that is billed in business transactions. Based on the Microsoft Dataverse account entity (Microsoft.Dynamics.CRM.account).

name.description: The company or business name. This is the primary name column for the account entity.

accountnumber.description: ID number or code for the account to quickly search and identify the account in system views.

description.description: Additional information to describe the account, such as an excerpt from the company website.

emailaddress1.description: Primary email address for the account.

emailaddress2.description: Secondary email address for the account.

emailaddress3.description: Alternate email address for the account.

telephone1.description: Main phone number for this account.

telephone2.description: Second phone number for this account.

telephone3.description: Third phone number for this account.

revenue.description: Annual revenue for the account, used as an indicator in financial performance analysis.

revenue_base.description: Annual revenue converted to the system default base currency.

numberofemployees.description: Number of employees that work at the account for use in marketing segmentation and demographic analysis.

sic.description: Standard Industrial Classification (SIC) code that indicates the account primary industry of business.

tickersymbol.description: Stock exchange symbol for the account to track financial performance.

stockexchange.description: Stock exchange at which the account is listed.

industrycode.description: Primary industry for the account for use in marketing segmentation and demographic analysis.

x-enum-descriptions.2: Agriculture and Non-petrol Natural Resource Extraction

accountcategorycode.description: Category indicating whether the customer account is standard or preferred.

accountclassificationcode.description: Classification code indicating the potential value of the customer account.

accountratingcode.description: Rating to indicate the value of the customer account.

customertypecode.description: Category describing the relationship between the account and your organization.

customersizecode.description: Size category of the account for segmentation and reporting purposes.

businesstypecode.description: Legal designation or other business type of the account for contracts or reporting purposes.

paymenttermscode.description: Payment terms indicating when the customer needs to pay the total amount.

shippingmethodcode.description: Shipping method for deliveries sent to the account address.

creditlimit.description: Credit limit of the account for reference when addressing invoice and accounting issues.

creditlimit_base.description: Credit limit converted to the system default base currency.

creditonhold.description: Whether the credit for the account is on hold.

donotemail.description: Whether the account allows direct email sent from Microsoft Dynamics 365.

donotphone.description: Whether the account allows phone calls.

donotpostalmail.description: Whether the account allows direct mail.

donotbulkemail.description: Whether the account allows bulk email sent through campaigns.

donotbulkpostalmail.description: Whether the account allows bulk postal mail sent through marketing campaigns.

donotsendmm.description: Whether the account accepts marketing materials such as brochures or catalogs.

marketingonly.description: Whether the account is only for marketing purposes.

followemail.description: Whether to allow following email activity like opens, attachment views, and link clicks.

address1_name.description: Descriptive name for the primary address, such as Corporate Headquarters.

address1_line1.description: First line of the primary address.

address1_line2.description: Second line of the primary address.

address1_line3.description: Third line of the primary address.

address1_stateorprovince.description: State or province of the primary address.

address1_postalcode.description: ZIP Code or postal code for the primary address.

address1_country.description: Country or region for the primary address.

address1_telephone1.description: Main phone number associated with the primary address.

address1_telephone2.description: Second phone number associated with the primary address.

address1_telephone3.description: Third phone number associated with the primary address.

address1_fax.description: Fax number associated with the primary address.

address1_latitude.description: Latitude value for the primary address.

address1_longitude.description: Longitude value for the primary address.

address1_postofficebox.description: Post office box number of the primary address.

address1_primarycontactname.description: Name of the main contact at the primary address.

address1_shippingmethodcode.description: Shipping method for deliveries sent to the primary address.

address1_freighttermscode.description: Freight terms for the primary address.

address1_upszone.description: UPS zone of the primary address.

address1_utcoffset.description: UTC offset for the primary address time zone.

address2_name.description: Descriptive name for the secondary address.

address2_line1.description: First line of the secondary address.

address2_line2.description: Second line of the secondary address.

address2_line3.description: Third line of the secondary address.

address2_stateorprovince.description: State or province of the secondary address.

address2_postalcode.description: ZIP Code or postal code for the secondary address.

address2_country.description: Country or region for the secondary address.

address2_telephone1.description: Main phone number associated with the secondary address.

address2_fax.description: Fax number associated with the secondary address.

address2_latitude.description: Latitude value for the secondary address.

address2_longitude.description: Longitude value for the secondary address.

marketcap.description: Market capitalization of the account, used as an indicator in financial performance analysis.

marketcap_base.description: Market capitalization converted to the system default base currency.

sharesoutstanding.description: Number of shares available to the public for the account.

ftpsiteurl.description: URL for the account FTP site.

yominame.description: Phonetic spelling of the company name, if specified in Japanese.

statecode.description: Whether the account is active or inactive.

merged.description: Whether the account has been merged with another account.

_parentaccountid_value.description: Parent account associated with this account.

_masterid_value.description: Master account that the account was merged with.

_ownerid_value.description: User or team assigned to manage the record.

_owningbusinessunit_value.description: Business unit that the record owner belongs to.

_preferredsystemuserid_value.description: Preferred service representative for the account.

_slaid_value.description: Service level agreement applied to the account.

_createdonbehalfby_value.description: User who created the record on behalf of another user.

_modifiedby_value.description: User who last updated the record.

_modifiedonbehalfby_value.description: User who last updated the record on behalf of another user.

createdon.description: Date and time when the record was created.

modifiedon.description: Date and time when the record was last updated.

exchangerate.description: Conversion rate of the record currency.

participatesinworkflow.description: For system use only. Legacy Microsoft Dynamics CRM 3.0 workflow data.

processid.description: ID of the process associated with the account.

importsequencenumber.description: Unique identifier of the data import or data migration that created this record.

overriddencreatedon.description: Date and time that the record was migrated.

lastonholdtime.description: Date and time stamp of the last on hold time.

lastusedincampaign.description: Date when the account was last included in a marketing campaign or quick campaign.

onholdtime.description: How long, in minutes, that the record was on hold.

examples.name: Contoso Ltd.
examples.description: A global leader in technology solutions.
